description: A classification of governance artifacts by their documentary form.

namedIndividuals.description: Minutes, agendas, or decision logs from governance committee meetings.
namedIndividuals.name: Committee Minutes

namedIndividuals.description: Email correspondence documenting governance requests, approvals, or decisions.
namedIndividuals.name: Email

namedIndividuals.description: A signed legal instrument such as a DSA, DUA, MOU, or SOW.
namedIndividuals.name: Signed Agreement

title: Governance Artifact Type

@id.description: An Internationalized Resource Identifier (IRI). May be a full IRI or a compact IRI (CURIE) resolved by the JSON-LD context.
@id.title: IRI
